testcase.name: billingfinalcalculatev4

failure.message: expected [{"Billing":{"Success":true,"Data":{"BatchId":"BATCHID","NumberOfValidTransaction":1,"HasTransferErrorInReport":false,"List":[{"LocationId":"TESTLOC018","CustomerId":"50000201","ServiceOrderNumber":"SORD00000009024"}],"TransferErrorList":[],"ReportErrorList":[]},"Messages":[]}}] but found [{"Billing":{"Success":false,"Data":{"BatchId":"BATCHID","NumberOfValidTransaction":0,"HasTransferErrorInReport":true,"List":[],"TransferErrorList":[{"ServiceOrderNumber":"SORD00000009024","LocationId":"TESTLOC018"}],"ReportErrorList":[{"Name":"Billing Final Calculate Transfer Error List","DisplayName":"Transfer Error List","PrintOrder":1}]},"Messages":[]}}]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [{"Billing":{"Success":true,"Data":{"BatchId":"BATCHID","NumberOfValidTransaction":1,"HasTransferErrorInReport":false,"List":[{"LocationId":"TESTLOC018","CustomerId":"50000201","ServiceOrderNumber":"SORD00000009024"}],"TransferErrorList":[],"ReportErrorList":[]},"Messages":[]}}] but found
